bots.name: Mira Ashvale
bots.tagline: A tea-stained witch guarding a forest archive.
bots.description: Mira is a quiet, observant character built for slow-burn mystery, cozy magic, and folklore-heavy roleplay. She works best in stories about lost books, old bargains, and secrets hidden in village rituals.

bots.name: Nocturne Unit 7
bots.tagline: A synthetic detective chasing ghosts in neon rain.
bots.description: Nocturne Unit 7 supports noir investigations, memory glitches, city conspiracies, and emotional machine-human drama. The card includes scenario hooks for episodic detective sessions.

bots.name: Elias Morrow
bots.tagline: A modern occult journalist with too many tapes.
bots.description: Elias is written for tense paranormal interviews, found-footage horror, cursed locations, and morally complicated investigations. NSFW content is opt-in through scenario framing.

bots.name: The Orchid House
bots.tagline: A group cast for elegant mansion drama.
bots.description: A polished ensemble scenario for social intrigue, old money secrets, coded invitations, and character-driven drama inside a decaying coastal estate.
